ksa_text: Ability to develop, document, communicate, and iteratively update governance policies that reflect organizational objectives, regulatory requirements, and evolving AI capabilities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-A-004 (AI Governance/Ability) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.507, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.507). Core signal: 0, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. AI Governance at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for Robotics Engineer.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.507, and AI Governance (AG) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA (composite 0.507)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this AI Governance competency as a standard Robotics Engineer requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
